LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarsh.label: Harshly oppressed
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarsh.stages.0.label: Oppressed
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.label: Deterred by high suppression
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.description: The guards are intimidating... I dare not act out...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.stages.0.label: Deterred
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.label: Treated equally
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.description: As a prisoner, I am actually treated equally!
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.stages.0.label: Treated equally
